abstract.text: This article describes the KeyboardKit layout engine.
This type defines the full set of keys on a keyboard and
is also a namespace for layout-related types.
An input set defines the input keys on a keyboard.
This base class provides a foundation for generating
layouts that are based on an
Create a layout service for the provided locale.
This protocol is implemented by locale-specific services.
This class is inherited by all Pro services and also
serves as a namespace for Pro service types.
KeyboardKit helps you create custom keyboard extensions with Swift and SwiftUI.
This protocol can be implemented by any classes that can
generate keyboard layouts in various ways.
